summary: Frontend-only testing of /play page refactoring: DimExpandedModal overlay replaced with inline DimExpanded panel (mirrors /dine). All 8 core test cases PASSED. /dine regression also PASSED.

test_session.user: dipali@clubconcierge.in (member account used; 'aditya'/'lola4304' are admin credentials for /admin panel, not member login)

ui_bugs.issue: Outings & Parks shows 'No products found for Mojo in this category.' — This is a pre-existing DATA issue (no products tagged for 'outings' dimension for Indie breed), NOT a refactoring regression.
Mira's Picks panel shows header/quote but products area appears empty in screenshot (MiraPicksSection fetches asynchronously). Pre-existing, not a refactoring issue.

issues: DineSoulPage DimExpanded component is missing data-testid on the outer container div. PlaySoulPage has data-testid='play-dim-expanded-{id}' but DineSoulPage has none. Not a visual bug but affects testability.

test_results.T1_play_page_loads_with_pet: PASS - /play loads with Mojo's data, not 'Add your dog'
test_results.T2_inline_expansion_not_overlay: PASS - Panel position=static (inline, NOT fixed overlay)
test_results.T3_inline_panel_content: PASS - Mira quote, All Products tab, Personalised tab all present
test_results.T4_personalised_tab: PASS - Personalised tab shows breed/personalised content
test_results.T5_collapse_on_reclick: PASS - Clicking same dimension again collapses the panel
test_results.T6_soul_play_inline: PASS - Soul Play expanded inline with breed/bandana content
test_results.T7_mira_picks_inline_no_tabs: PASS - Mira's Picks expanded inline, no Products/Personalised tabs (correct for mira dim)
test_results.T8_no_overlay_modal: PASS - No full-screen fixed overlay present at any point on /play
test_results.T9_play_category_strip: PASS - PlayCategoryStrip 'Outings' button also triggers inline expansion
test_results.T10_dine_regression: PASS - /dine inline expansion still works (Daily Meals expanded inline with products, sub-category pills: All/Special Diets/Portion Guide/Morning Meal/Evening Meal)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add data-testid to DineSoulPage DimExpanded outer container (e.g., data-testid='dine-dim-expanded-{dim.id}') for consistency with PlaySoulPage
DATA: Tag/assign products for the 'outings' dimension for Indie breed so that Outings & Parks doesn't show empty state
NOTE: 'aditya'/'lola4304' credentials are for admin panel (/admin), not member login. For future member login testing, use dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123
critical_code_review_comments: Implementation correct: DimExpanded in PlaySoulPage is inline (not a portal/fixed overlay), passes apiProducts from parent (pre-fetched), no internal fetch — exactly mirrors DineSoulPage.

State management correct: openDim state controls which panel is shown. activeDim = playDims.find(d=>d.id===openDim) correctly resolves the active dimension. Toggle logic (isOpen ? null : dim.id) correctly handles collapse.
No race conditions: Since apiProducts is pre-fetched in parent useEffect and passed as prop, there's no async loading race in the expanded panel.
The DimExpanded position=static means it's truly inline in the document flow, not a fixed/absolute overlay — this is the correct behavior as specified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /play page dimension expansion behavior verified working inline (no overlay). The refactoring from DimExpandedModal overlay to DimExpanded inline panel is complete and functional. Test approach: set localStorage tdb_auth_token + selectedPetId='pet-mojo-7327ad56', then reload page and use wait_for_function for play-dim-* cards. Token from /api/auth/login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. 'aditya'/'lola4304' = admin only.
